item.title: Resume
item.description:
John Doe Link to heading

📍 Nashville, TN • 📞 (615) 522-8063 • ✉️ crozitb0@mail.com • LinkedIn • GitHub

🧠 Summary Link to heading

Experienced software engineer with 7+ years in backend systems, cloud infrastructure, and data engineering. Passionate about building reliable systems, automating workflows, and mentoring junior developers.

🛠 Skills Link to heading

  • Languages: Python, Go, SQL, JavaScript
  • Cloud: GCP, AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes
  • Data: BigQuery, PostgreSQL, Airflow, dbt
  • Tools: GitHub Actions, Docker, Bash, CI/CD

💼 Experience Link to heading

Senior Data Engineer Link to heading

Acme Corp – Nashville, TN | 2021 – Present

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hi, I’m Blake Crozier — a cloud data engineer passionate about building secure, scalable, and cost-efficient data systems on GCP.

I specialize in:

  • Terraform infrastructure automation
  • BigQuery optimization and cost tracking
  • Serverless pipelines using Cloud Functions & Pub/Sub

Outside of work, I climb rocks, explore carpentry, and help nonprofits solve technical problems.
